title: Core Constraint Engine - NeoGrid Rules
description:
# Task: Core Constraint Engine - NeoGrid Rules

## Context
We are adding support for NeoGrid/openGrid (28mm grid). The solver needs to know how to handle these specific dimension increments.

## Objective
- Implement NeoGrid dimension rules (28mm increments) into the solver worker.
- Add unit tests verifying feasibility when a drawer is filled strictly with NeoGrid dimension multiples.
- Ensure the 84mm interoperability (3x28mm = 2x42mm) is accounted for in the solver's grid alignment logic.

## Links
- Worker: `packages/solver/src/workers/constraintWorker.ts`
- Dimensions: `.jules/tech-stack.md` and PRD §5.6.
- Catalog: `packages/catalog/src/GridSystem.ts`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Solver updated to handle 28mm grid units.
- [ ] Unit tests in `packages/solver/src/feasibility.test.ts` passing.
- [ ] Interoperability test case added.

title: Canvas Interaction Optimization - Fill Space Mode
description:
# Task: Canvas Interaction Optimization - Fill Space Mode

## Context
The `SketchCanvas.tsx` component handles both drawing and layout rendering. When in "Fill Space" mode, heavy event handlers for drawing are still active, which can lead to performance issues during live packing updates.

## Objective
- Optimize the rendering loop in `SketchCanvas.tsx`.
- Conditionally bypass drawing event listeners when `activeFeatureId` refers to a space-filling operation.
- Ensure the MaxRects packed layout renders efficiently without unnecessary re-renders.

## Links
- Component: `apps/web/src/ui/SketchCanvas.tsx`
- Packer: `packages/packer/src/packer.ts`
- Tech Stack: `.jules/tech-stack.md`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] PR created with optimized canvas rendering.
- [ ] Profiling shows reduced main thread blockage during bin updates.
- [ ] Regression test for basic drawing functionality.

title: E2E Testing - Gridfinity Validity Flow
description:
# Task: E2E Testing - Gridfinity Validity Flow

## Context
We need to ensure the end-to-end flow for grid systems is reliable, especially the validity feedback to the user.

## Objective
- Write a new Playwright test that simulates the following user story:
  1. Define a 24"x24" drawer.
  2. Select the Gridfinity system.
  3. Add a hard constraint that is feasible.
  4. Verify the `ValidityBadge` turns Green.
  5. Add a hard constraint that is geometrically impossible.
  6. Verify the `ValidityBadge` turns Red and lists the conflict.

## Links
- Test file: `apps/web/e2e/user-stories.spec.ts`
- UI State: `packages/store/src/useStore.ts`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] New E2E test passing in CI.
- [ ] Test covers both feasible and infeasible grid states.

title: UI Polish - BOM Panel Styling
description:
# Task: UI Polish - BOM Panel Styling

## Context
The `BOMPanel.tsx` component is functional but lacks visual polish. It needs to align with our production-grade design standards while accurately reflecting real-time constraints and totals.

## Objective
- Refine the styling of the `BOMPanel` using Tailwind CSS.
- Ensure it displays clear totals for price, bin count, and area.
- Add unit tests for the component to handle edge cases:
  - Empty bin list.
  - Bins with missing prices.
  - Exceeding assembly-level budget caps.

## Links
- Component: `apps/web/src/ui/BOMPanel.tsx`
- State: `packages/store/src/useStore.ts`
- Design Guidelines: `.jules/product-guidelines.md`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] PR created with refined `BOMPanel` UI.
- [ ] Responsive layout confirmed.
- [ ] Unit tests passing in `apps/web/src/ui/BOMPanel.test.tsx`.

title: Catalog Expansion - Akro-Mils Variants
description:
# Task: Catalog Expansion - Akro-Mils Variants

## Context
The current catalog only has a subset of Akro-Mils bins. We need to expand this to cover more common 30-series variants.

## Objective
- Add 5 new Akro-Mils 30-series bin variants to `packages/catalog/src/akromils.ts`.
- Ensure accurate nominal/actual dimensions, price, and `catalogSource`.
- Update validation tests to ensure new bins are correctly parsed and searchable.

## Links
- File: `packages/catalog/src/akromils.ts`
- Schema: `packages/catalog/src/bin.ts`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] 5 new bin variants added to the catalog.
- [ ] `packages/catalog/src/lookup.test.ts` updated and passing.
- [ ] Catalog data verified against official Akro-Mils specs.
